text.title: Spring Boot Layered Architecture Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the service-scaffold manifest this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "spring_boot_version": "2.7.0", "endpoints": [{"path": "/api/v1/users", "method": "GET", "returns_dto": false, "list_pageable": false}], "uses_mapstruct": false, "uses_bcrypt_in_service": false, "jakarta_imports_only": false, "forbidden_patterns_found": ["javax.persistence.Entity import in src/main/java/.../User.java"] }
example.note: Boot 2.x; entity returned from controller; list endpoint without Pageable; MapStruct off; BCrypt missing; javax imports present.

list.item: `findAll()` without `Pageable` on a growable list endpoint.
`self.method()` call relying on `@Transactional` on the same bean (self-invocation bypasses the proxy).
